institution.name: Bryn Athyn College of the New Church

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Bryn Athyn College of the New Church are 32% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($40.5k vs $59.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Bryn Athyn College of the New Church rose 19% between 2006 and 2009 ($10.1k → $12.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Bryn Athyn College of the New Church rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($26.2k → $28.9k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Bryn Athyn College of the New Church rose 55% between 2021 and 2024 (32.8% → 50.9%).
